bookSourceComment: fq-tt-worker Cloudflare 书源。搜索、目录、正文走 Worker；段评入口需要单独导入 paragraphRule-fq-tt-worker.json。

ruleContent.content:
<js>
function pickId(text,names){var s=String(text||'');for(var i=0;i<names.length;i++){var re=new RegExp('(?:[?&,{}\\s\"\']|^)'+names[i]+'(?:\"?\\s*[:=]\\s*\"?|=)([0-9]{6,})','i');var m=s.match(re);if(m&&m[1])return m[1];}return '';}
function safeGet(k){try{return String(java.get(k)||'');}catch(e){return '';}}
function safeStr(v){try{return String(v||'');}catch(e){return '';}}
function objStr(v){try{return JSON.stringify(v)||'';}catch(e){return safeStr(v);}}
var raw=safeStr(result);
var meta=decodeChapterMeta(raw);
var scan=raw+' '+safeStr(typeof baseUrl==='undefined'?'':baseUrl)+' '+objStr(typeof chapter==='undefined'?null:chapter)+' '+objStr(typeof book==='undefined'?null:book);
var bookId=String(meta.book_id||meta.bookId||param('book_id')||safeGet('book_id')||safeGet('fqtt_book_id')||pickId(scan,['book_id','bookId','bookid'])||'');
var itemId=String(meta.item_id||meta.itemId||meta.item_ids||param('item_ids')||param('item_id')||safeGet('item_id')||safeGet('fqtt_item_id')||pickId(scan,['item_ids','item_id','itemId','itemid'])||'');
if(itemId.indexOf(',')>=0)itemId=itemId.split(',')[0];
if(!bookId||!itemId){
  result='正文获取失败: 缺少必要参数: '+(!bookId?'book_id':'item_ids');
}else{
  try{java.put('book_id',bookId);java.put('fqtt_book_id',bookId);java.put('fqtt_item_id',itemId);}catch(e){}
  var url=getBase()+'/?api=full&book_id='+enc(bookId)+'&item_ids='+enc(itemId);
  var payload=JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
  var data=payload.data||{};
  var chapters=data.chapters||[];
  var first=chapters.length?chapters[0]:{};
  var content=first.content||data.content||'';
  if(!content&&payload.error){content='正文获取失败: '+payload.error;}
  result=addCommentEntries(content,bookId,itemId);
}
</js>
ruleContent.title: @js:result=chapter.title||'';
